creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
Some leftovers for me:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/tortoisehg/util/hgdispatch.py
Error: Orphaned: %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/tortoisehg/util/hgdispatch.pyc
Error: Orphaned: %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/tortoisehg/util/hgdispatch.pyo
===> Checking for directories handled by dependencies
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR

Can you verify that?
